meaning: n.[化]金属茂(合物),茂(合)金属
examples: Metallocene catalysts are very rapidly increasing in the world, and have wide application and market prospects.
Metallocene catalysts technique provides the possibility for developing more polyolefin resins of high performance.
Syntheses of these materials which are prepared difficultly by traditional catalyst are easy by metallocene catalysis technology.
The result is expected to be a marked increase in the adoption of metallocene and single-site catalyst technologies.
Countless others are following suit, as customers start inquiring about metallocene technology.
